security.csp: default-src 'self' asset:; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; frame-src 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' http://localhost:1420; frame-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: A lightweight EPUB reader with AI assistant
bundle.longDescription: CReader is a minimalist EPUB reader built with Tauri. Features include library management, reading progress tracking, dark/light/sepia themes, and an AI assistant for discussing your books.
